chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-2091 of 2019 CP No.D-6135 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.9341/2019. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 20.12.2024 Mr. Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, these Petitions have served their purpose and become infructuous, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office to place a copy hereof in connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
